title: The Desert Bride
writer: Elmer Harris, Ewart Adamson, Anthony Coldeway
actors: Betty Compson, Allan Forrest, Edward Martindel
plot: Captain Maurice de Florimont (Allan Forrest), a French Army intelligence officer, is captured by Arab nationalists while on an espionage mission. His sweetheart Diane Duval (Betty Compson) is also taken prisoner. Both are tortured...
